display.purpose: Rare workspace-landing and section-hero headlines. Not used in the app shell.

headline.purpose: Page titles — workspace, settings, modal title row.

title.purpose: Card and section titles inside the app.

body.purpose: The dominant UI text size. Chat messages, list rows, form labels.

label.purpose: Badge text, metadata, hotkey hints, timestamps. Uppercase permitted for badges only.

code.purpose: Inline code spans and fenced code blocks.

serif-accent.purpose: InstrumentSerif, held in reserve for named editorial moments only.

shadows.name: message-input-lift
shadows.purpose: Lift for the composing surface — the agent message input.

shadows.name: modal-lift
shadows.purpose: Modal envelope lift; always paired with backdrop-blur-sm and a hairline border.

shadows.name: popover-blur
shadows.purpose: Dark transient popovers (drag preview, hint cards).

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Default for button / input state transitions. Ease-out-quart.

motion.name: fade-minimal
motion.purpose: Modal backdrop fade — just enough to avoid a jarring pop-in.

components.name: Primary Button (Light Mode)
components.description: Primary action in dialogs and confirmation rows. Workshop Dark fill, Page Fill text, pill radius.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(0.2 0 0); color: oklch(0.94 0 0); font-family: Inter, Vazirmatn, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.5; padding: 8px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 24px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.27 0 0); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.69 0.17 237); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Cancel/dismiss companion to a primary action. Page Fill background, Strong Ink text.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: oklch(0.94 0 0); color: oklch(0.32 0 0); font-family: Inter, Vazirmatn, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.5; padding: 8px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 24px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: oklch(0.92 0 0); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.69 0.17 237); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Sidebar Chat Item
components.description: Full-width row in the chat list. Rounded-xl, tight padding, active state fills with Page Fill.
components.html: Draft the 24Q4 campaign brief
components.css: .ds-sidebar-item { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; gap: 8px; width: 100%; min-height: 32px; padding: 6px 11px; border-radius: 12px; color: oklch(0.42 0 0); font-family: Inter, Vazirmatn, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.5; text-decoration: none; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); cursor: pointer; } .ds-sidebar-item:hover { background: oklch(0.94 0 0); } .ds-sidebar-item[aria-current="page"], .ds-sidebar-item.is-active { background: oklch(0.94 0 0); color: oklch(0.16 0 0); } .ds-sidebar-item__title { flex: 1; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .ds-sidebar-item__dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 9999px; background: oklch(0.69 0.17 237); flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Text Input (Pill)
components.description: Standard text input. Soft rounded-lg, hairline border, focus deepens the border.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 8px 16px; background: oklch(0.98 0 0); color: oklch(0.42 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.92 0 0); border-radius: 8px; font-family: Inter, Vazirmatn, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.5; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.77 0 0); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: oklch(0.85 0 0); } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Info Badge
components.description: Status chip at 20% hue fill with 700-weight text. Uppercase, tiny padding, label-scale.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-block; padding: 0 5px; border-radius: 8px; font-family: Inter, Vazirmatn, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; letter-spacing: 0.02em; text-transform: uppercase; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-badge--info { background: color-mix(in oklab, oklch(0.62 0.19 259) 20%, transparent); color: oklch(0.45 0.17 259); }
components.notes: Swap `--info` for `--success` / `--warning` / `--danger` by substituting status-success / status-warning / status-danger. Always 20% fill + deep-ink text.

components.name: Agent Message Input
components.description: Signature composing surface. Rounded-3xl pill with translucent fill, backdrop-blur lift, hairline border that deepens on hover/focus.
components.css: .ds-message-input { display: flex; align-items: flex-end; gap: 8px; padding: 8px 12px; background: color-mix(in oklab, oklch(0.98 0 0) 5%, transparent); backdrop-filter: blur(4px); border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklab, oklch(0.92 0 0) 30%, transparent); border-radius: 24px; box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 4px 6px -4px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-message-input:hover { border-color: oklch(0.85 0 0); } .ds-message-input:focus-within { border-color: oklch(0.85 0 0); } .ds-message-input__field { flex: 1; background: transparent; border: none; outline: none; resize: none; color: oklch(0.42 0 0); font-family: Inter, Vazirmatn, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.5; padding: 6px 4px; max-height: 200px; } .ds-message-input__field::placeholder { color: oklch(0.77 0 0); } .ds-message-input__send { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 32px; height: 32px; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; background: oklch(0.2 0 0); color: oklch(0.94 0 0); cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-message-input__send:hover { background: oklch(0.27 0 0); } .ds-message-input__send:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Modal Surface
components.description: Primary dialog envelope. 32px radius, blurred translucent fill, hairline ghost border, soft lift.
components.html:
Delete this agent?

This action cannot be undone. The agent's memory and connected tools will be detached.
components.css: .ds-modal { width: min(32rem, 100% - 1rem); padding: 24px 28px; background: color-mix(in oklab, oklch(0.98 0 0) 95%, transparent); backdrop-filter: blur(4px); border: 1px solid oklch(0.98 0 0); border-radius: 32px; box-shadow: 0 35px 60px -15px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.3); } .ds-modal__title { margin: 0 0 10px 0; font-family: Inter, Vazirmatn, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.3; color: oklch(0.16 0 0); } .ds-modal__body { margin: 0 0 24px 0; font-family: Inter, Vazirmatn, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.5; color: oklch(0.51 0 0); } .ds-modal__actions { display: flex; gap: 6px; } .ds-modal__actions > button { flex: 1; } .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(0.2 0 0); color: oklch(0.94 0 0); font-family: Inter, Vazirmatn, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 8px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 24px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.27 0 0); } .ds-btn-secondary { background: oklch(0.94 0 0); color: oklch(0.32 0 0); font-family: Inter, Vazirmatn, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 8px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 24px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: oklch(0.92 0 0); }

components.name: Agent Chip
components.description: Signature identity marker. Round agent avatar with a hairline ring and a named label beneath.
components.html:
N
Notion Librarian
gpt-4o · tools 3
components.css: .ds-agent-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; } .ds-agent-chip__avatar { width: 2.7rem; height: 2.7rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: oklch(0.94 0 0); color: oklch(0.32 0 0); display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border: 1px solid oklch(0.92 0 0); font-family: Archivo, Vazirmatn, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; } .ds-agent-chip__meta { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; line-height: 1.2; } .ds-agent-chip__name { font-family: Inter, Vazirmatn, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.16 0 0); } .ds-agent-chip__model { font-family: Inter, Vazirmatn, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.02em; color: oklch(0.69 0 0); }

narrative.overview: This is a craftsman's bench, not a showroom. The surface is where a Canva employee sits down with their named agents — picks one up, uses it, puts it back — alongside their tools, history, and context. Nothing is on display; everything is within reach. Density and calm coexist because that's how real workshops feel: organized, instrumented, unhurried. The shell recedes so the work stays visible. The aesthetic philosophy is strict tonal minimalism. A single 12-step neutral ramp, tuned in OKLCH with zero chroma, carries almost every surface. Color enters the system only where it has a job: Mention Sky for live indicators and @-mentions, a narrow semantic palette for status badges, a near-black primary button that inverts in dark mode. The accent budget is small on purpose — the absence of color is what lets density stop feeling noisy. This system explicitly rejects ChatGPT's centered-prompt void, model-forward chrome, SaaS hero-metric dashboards, crypto-neon, consumer-social warmth, and Notion's document-flatness when it fights app density. Where other AI surfaces perform excitement, this one performs competence.
keyCharacteristics: Zero-chroma neutral ramp with a sparse sky/semantic accent layer.
Hybrid elevation: flat at rest, blurred-and-lifted for modals and popovers only.
Inter as the working face; Archivo for chrome headlines; InstrumentSerif held in reserve.
Radius language runs from 4px utility up to 32px for modal envelopes — large radii signal 'floating,' tight radii signal 'embedded.'
Motion is under 200ms, functional, eased out. No bounce, no choreography.

rules.name: The One-Accent Rule
rules.body: Mention Sky is the only decorative color permitted in the chrome. If a new feature needs a decorative accent, use weight, size, ink contrast, or white space — not a second hue.

rules.name: The Model-Name Exile Rule
rules.body: Raw model identifiers (gpt-4o-2024-08-06, claude-3-5-sonnet-*) must never sit in primary chrome. If a model string is surfaced at all, it is secondary metadata under the agent's name, in Muted Ink at label scale.

rules.name: The Zero-Chroma Default Rule
rules.body: Grayscale is literally zero chroma. Do not drift neutrals toward a warm or cool tint unless a feature explicitly requires it and documents why.

rules.name: The Serif-In-Reserve Rule
rules.body: InstrumentSerif exists in the app and must stay rare. It is reserved for named editorial moments — never for generic emphasis, never for body, never for labels.

rules.name: The RTL-First Rule
rules.body: Every font stack includes Vazirmatn. New stacks must include it. RTL parity is a latent requirement of this surface.

rules.name: The Scale-Text-Scale Rule
rules.body: The app supports --app-text-scale on :root. Custom line-heights and min-heights declared in pixel units must multiply through this variable. Hard-coding pixel line-heights outside the scale system is forbidden.

rules.name: The Flat-Until-Floating Rule
rules.body: If a surface stays on the page flow, it is flat. Shadows exist only on elements that detach from the flow (dialogs, menus, the message input, drag previews). A card that sits in a grid does not get a shadow.

rules.name: The Blur-Is-The-Depth Rule
rules.body: Lift comes from backdrop-blur against a translucent fill, not from heavy drop shadows. If a surface needs to feel 'above,' increase the blur strength before increasing the shadow strength.

rules.name: The Ghost-Border Rule
rules.body: Modals carry a 1px border of Paper White (light) / Panel Dark (dark). This hairline replaces what a larger shadow would otherwise do — it defines the edge against the blurred backdrop without shouting.

dos: Do use Workshop Dark as the primary button fill in light mode, inverted to Page Fill in dark mode.
Do reserve Mention Sky (oklch(0.69 0.17 237)) for @-mentions and live-state dots. Nothing else.
Do cap body prose at 65–75ch where long-form content appears.
Do use large radii (rounded-3xl, rounded-4xl) to signal 'this surface is floating' (modals, input pills), and small radii (rounded-lg) to signal 'this surface is embedded' (inputs, badges).
Do compose elevation with backdrop-blur against translucent fills, not with heavy drop shadows.
Do name agents in the chrome. The model is metadata under the agent, never the primary title.
Do include Vazirmatn in every new font stack for RTL parity.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion — transitions should become instant, not merely slower.
donts: Don't introduce a second decorative hue. The one-accent rule (Mention Sky only) is the rule.
Don't put raw model identifiers (gpt-4o-…, claude-3-5-sonnet-…) in primary chrome.
Don't recreate the ChatGPT 'centered prompt in a void' landing. Sidebar stays. History is structured. Agents are named.
Don't reach for a hero-metric dashboard layout (big number + three stat cards + gradient CTA).
Don't use crypto-neon gradients, magenta-cyan glow cores, or black-grid floors.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient). Solid ink only.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left greater than 1px as a colored accent).
Don't reach for a modal as the first thought. Exhaust inline and progressive disclosure before adding a dialog.
Don't apply shadows to surfaces that sit in the page flow. Flat-until-floating.
Don't drift the gray ramp toward warm or cool tints. Zero chroma is the signature.
Don't introduce confetti, emoji bursts, celebratory bounces, or any consumer-social warmth.
Don't break RTL by hard-coding left/right. Use logical properties or Tailwind's ms-/me- utilities.
Don't animate CSS layout properties. Transform and opacity only.
